summary: Iteration 2: validated NEW features only — admin auth on GET /api/leads (X-Admin-Token), SEO <title> uniqueness across public pages, and robots.txt + sitemap.xml availability. Extended /app/backend/tests/test_nepal_trip_api.py with admin-auth and static-file tests. All 14 pytest tests PASS. Frontend admin gate (token gate → invalid toast → valid login → filter buttons → refresh → logout clears localStorage) works end-to-end via Playwright. POST /api/leads remains public.
critical_code_review_comments: ADMIN_TOKEN comparison in server.py is a constant-string compare; for production, consider hmac.compare_digest to mitigate timing attacks (minor, low risk).

AdminLeads.jsx triggers an automatic fetch on mount if a token is in localStorage — fine, but a brief flash of the gate is possible before the auth flips; consider an initial loading state. Non-blocking.

robots.txt served from the preview ingress is augmented with extra AI-bot rules, but the project's custom rules (Disallow /admin, Sitemap pointer) are preserved. No action required for preview; verify on production deployment that the original /app/frontend/public/robots.txt is served verbatim.
test_credentials: ADMIN_TOKEN=N-lwBYKgl0F2aE95jJeQoBoqL-tS0Gblp-IERvYaTk0 (from /app/backend/.env). NOTE: /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty — main agent should write this token into it for future iterations.
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_-prefixed leads (service/package/general) via POST /api/leads as part of normal CRUD tests; left in DB for next iteration to inspect.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_nepal_trip_api.py and now cover: root/health, public POST /api/leads (service/package/general/validation), admin-only GET /api/leads (missing/wrong/empty/correct token + category filters), and static /robots.txt + /sitemap.xml. ADMIN token constant is hardcoded in the test file for convenience; if rotated in backend/.env, update the ADMIN_TOKEN constant in the test file too. Frontend admin route is /admin/leads with testids: admin-login-page, admin-token-input, admin-login-submit, admin-leads-page, filter-(all|general|service|package), refresh-leads, admin-logout.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
